assignment_description:

⍞ Materials: The Complete Book of Chalk Lettering

➜ VIEW & PRACTICE

⍞ Image Resource: The Complete Book of Chalk Lettering p.10

➜ NOTE
You will be completing this with watercolor and round brush, size 6 or 8.

assignment_description:
Words in Shapes
⍞ Materials: The Complete Book of Chalk Lettering

➜ NOTE
Create your projects based on the lesson title and concepts you have learned throughout your Lettering journey. You may complete these using the medium of your choice. The techniques and skills you have learned stay the same, regardless of the medium, with a few exceptions when using a brush compared to a pen.

➜ RECAP
See pages 94-101, 122-169 in The Complete Book of Chalk Lettering for a refresher.
